title: Rustdoc Lints
description: Lint settings for rustdoc individual lints and the `all` lint.

bare_urls.title: Bare URLs
bare_urls.description: detects URLs that are not hyperlinks.

broken_intra_doc_links.title: Broken Intra Doc Links
broken_intra_doc_links.description: failures in resolving intra-doc link targets.

invalid_codeblock_attributes.title: Invalid Codeblock Attributes
invalid_codeblock_attributes.description: codeblock attribute looks a lot like a known one.

invalid_html_tags.title: Invalid HTML Tags
invalid_html_tags.description: detects invalid HTML tags in doc comments.

invalid_rust_codeblocks.title: Invalid Rust Codeblocks
invalid_rust_codeblocks.description: codeblock could not be parsed as valid Rust or is empty.

missing_crate_level_docs.title: Missing Crate Level Docs
missing_crate_level_docs.description: detects crates with no crate-level documentation.

missing_doc_code_examples.title: Missing Doc Code Examples
missing_doc_code_examples.description: detects publicly-exported items without code samples in their documentation.

private_doc_tests.title: Private Doc Tests
private_doc_tests.description: detects code samples in docs of private items not documented by rustdoc.

private_intra_doc_links.title: Private Intra Doc Links
private_intra_doc_links.description: linking from a public item to a private one.

redundant_explicit_links.title: Redundant Explicit Links
redundant_explicit_links.description: detects redundant explicit links in doc comments.

unescaped_backticks.title: Unescaped Backticks
unescaped_backticks.description: detects unescaped backticks in doc comments.

all.title: All
all.description: The group of all rustdoc lints (`#![allow(rustdoc::all)]`).

priority.description: The priority that controls which lints or [lint groups](https://doc.rust-lang.org/rustc/lints/groups.html) override other lint groups. Lower (particularly negative) numbers have lower priority, being overridden by higher numbers, and show up first on the command-line to tools like rustc.

LintLevel.title: Lint Level
LintLevel.description: Specify the [lint level](https://doc.rust-lang.org/rustc/lints/levels.html) for a lint or lint group.
